pydantic-field-no-patch.schema_version: per-file JSON schema version marker; not a firmware config value
pydantic-field-no-patch.mm_per_tick: derived host-side after load from wheel geometry; never stored or pushed
pydantic-field-no-patch.identity.*: host-side robot identity metadata (name/uid/hardware model/drivetrain type); never a wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.connection.*: host-side device-discovery/announcement bookkeeping; never a wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.vision.*: host-side camera/AprilTag geometry, consumed entirely host-side by the vision/goto stack; never pushed to firmware
pydantic-field-no-patch.geometry.drive_axle_offset_mm.*: host-side lever-arm geometry for camera/goto math; never a wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.geometry.odometry_offset_mm.*: OTOS lever-arm offset — OTOS ignores REG_OFFSET writes so this is host-side-only (see .clasi/knowledge/otos-offset-register-unwritable.md), pushed via the OI/OL/OA verbs, not the 096 Patch surface
pydantic-field-no-patch.geometry.odometry_chip_upside_down: construction-time HAL wiring flag (mirrors the pre-096 Config.h-era odomUpsideDown allowlist entry: 'runtime SET would not re-init the sensor')
pydantic-field-no-patch.geometry.wheelbase_mm: mecanum-only geometry; the 096 curated Patch surface covers only the differential trackwidth key (tw)
pydantic-field-no-patch.wheels.*: host-side wheel geometry used to derive mm_per_tick; not a Patch field itself
pydantic-field-no-patch.encoders.*: host-side capability/count flags; never a wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.drive.*: host-side motion-limit/crawl-mode tuning consumed entirely by rogo/camera_goto; never pushed via SET
pydantic-field-no-patch.gripper.*: host-side gripper geometry/capability flag; no wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.peripherals.laser_port: host-side port-wiring description; no wire config verb
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.otos_angular_scale: pushed via the OI/OL/OA verbs (int8 scalar register write), not the 096 Patch surface
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.otos_linear_scale: pushed via the OI/OL/OA verbs (int8 scalar register write), not the 096 Patch surface
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.rotation_gain: host-side open-loop turn-correction model consumed by rogo's `_turn_command`; not a firmware wire field
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.rotation_offset_deg: host-side open-loop turn-correction model consumed by rogo's `_turn_command`; not a firmware wire field
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.rotation_gain_neg: host-side open-loop turn-correction model consumed by rogo's `_turn_command`; not a firmware wire field
pydantic-field-no-patch.calibration.rotation_offset_deg_neg: host-side open-loop turn-correction model consumed by rogo's `_turn_command`; not a firmware wire field
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.vel_filt: stale pre-096 wire key (`vel.filt`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.sync: stale pre-096 wire key (`sync`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.min_wheel_mms: stale pre-096 wire key (`minWheelMms`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.turn_gate: stale pre-096 wire key (`turnGate`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.yaw_rate_max: stale pre-096 wire key (`yawRateMax`) — not present in config_commands.cpp's current 15-key kAllKeys table; pre-existing drift in host/robot_radio/io/cli.py's push_calibration(), tracked separately from this ticket
pydantic-field-no-patch.control.max_rot_accel_dps2: explicitly documented in its own field comment as host-only, NOT pushed to firmware

patch-field-no-pydantic.DrivetrainConfigPatch.ekf_q_xy: no host-side pydantic field yet; carried over from the pre-096 Config.h-era allowlist's ekfQxy entry ('register as tunable in a future sprint')
patch-field-no-pydantic.DrivetrainConfigPatch.ekf_q_theta: no host-side pydantic field yet; carried over from the pre-096 Config.h-era allowlist's ekfQtheta entry ('register as tunable in a future sprint')
patch-field-no-pydantic.DrivetrainConfigPatch.ekf_r_otos_xy: no host-side pydantic field yet; carried over from the pre-096 Config.h-era allowlist's ekfROtosXy entry ('register as tunable in a future sprint')
patch-field-no-pydantic.DrivetrainConfigPatch.ekf_r_otos_theta: no host-side pydantic field yet; carried over from the pre-096 Config.h-era allowlist's ekfROtosTheta entry ('register as tunable in a future sprint')
patch-field-no-pydantic.DrivetrainConfigPatch.ekf_r_fix_xy: no host-side pydantic field yet; mirrors ekf_r_otos_xy's own allowlist entry exactly (099-008: register as tunable in a future sprint)
patch-field-no-pydantic.DrivetrainConfigPatch.ekf_r_fix_theta: no host-side pydantic field yet; mirrors ekf_r_otos_theta's own allowlist entry exactly (099-008: register as tunable in a future sprint)
patch-field-no-pydantic.MotorConfigPatch.side: enum selector for travel_calib's target only, not itself a settable config value
patch-field-no-pydantic.PlannerConfigPatch.min_speed: no host-side pydantic field yet; DriveConfig.min_drive_mm_s is a distinct host-only crawl-mode floor, not the firmware planner's trapezoidal-profile min_speed
patch-field-no-pydantic.PlannerConfigPatch.heading_kp: no host-side pydantic field; bench tuning lives in data/robots/tovez.json's control.heading_kp (baked into boot config by gen_boot_config.py, 098-001), live tuning goes through set_config(headingKp=...) directly
patch-field-no-pydantic.PlannerConfigPatch.heading_kd: no host-side pydantic field; bench tuning lives in data/robots/tovez.json's control.heading_kd (baked into boot config by gen_boot_config.py, 098-001), live tuning goes through set_config(headingKd=...) directly
patch-field-no-pydantic.PlannerConfigPatch.v_wheel_max: no host-side pydantic field yet (100-001, motion-stack-v2 M1); bench tuning lives in data/robots/tovez.json's control.v_wheel_max (baked into boot config by gen_boot_config.py), live tuning goes through set_config(vWheelMax=...) directly
patch-field-no-pydantic.PlannerConfigPatch.steer_headroom: no host-side pydantic field yet (100-001); bench tuning lives in data/robots/tovez.json's control.steer_headroom, live tuning goes through set_config(steerHeadroom=...) directly
